title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubeadm.kubernetes.io/kube-apiserver.advertise-address.endpoint
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kubeadm.kubernetes.io/kube-apiserver.advertise-address.endpoint: https://172.17.0.18:6443
Used on: Pod
Annotation that kubeadm places on locally managed
kube-apiserver
Pods to keep track
of the exposed advertise address/port endpoint for that API server instance.

Type: Annotation
Example:
kubeadm.kubernetes.io/component-config.hash: 2c26b46b68ffc68ff99b453c1d30413413422d706483bfa0f98a5e886266e7ae
Used on: ConfigMap
Annotation that kubeadm places on ConfigMaps that it manages for configuring components.
It contains a hash (SHA-256) used to determine if the user has applied settings different
from the kubeadm defaults for a particular component.
